limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified dollar amounts, headcount, or capex figures tied to AI investment are disclosed in the excerpts; score reflects named integration activity and acknowledgment of significant investment required, but no quantified commitment.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI integration into business operations and products is named, but no specific deployed use cases with operating detail or metrics are described; excerpts are primarily risk-section material rather than business/MD&A narrative.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains detailed company-specific risk scenarios with mechanisms (IP loss, regulatory liability, product delays, competitive harm, cybersecurity via AI-enhanced attacks); scored 4 rather than 5 as no quantified risk figures or named governance/oversight bodies are disclosed.
